cms.task_text: Horní vodorovný tah číslice 7 má mít [hlp]60 bodů[/hlp], ale v kódu je špatná hodnota. Opravte ji.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
